criterion: Yukawa-Damping cluster joint random-null probability via Fisher's combined-p test

primary_result.interpretation: Fisher's combined-p test on three independent per-observable p-values under a uniform null on [0, 2.5%]. The three observables (alpha_dn at 0.0001%, w_DE at 0.05%, H_0 at 0.6%) yield individual p-values 4e-5, 0.02, 0.24; their Fisher-combined p_combined ~ 2.6e-5, corresponding to ~4.0 sigma (two-sided) significance.

framing: The 'three observables on the SAME loop class (1+gamma/4)' coincidence is treated as the structural prior absorbed in the deterministic mapping algorithm; the present Fisher's-combined-p computation captures the per-observable residual-cut combinatoric, i.e. the joint probability that three uniform-null draws all land at their respective observed residuals.
